basic_details.job_title: BEML Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 27 Engineer, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: BEML Limited (A Govt. of India Undertaking), Bangalore
basic_details.post_name: Senior Manager (Grade-V), Manager (Grade-IV), Assistant Manager (Grade-III), Engineer/Officer (Grade-II) - across various High-Speed Rail R&D domains
basic_details.short_information: BEML Limited Executive Recruitment 2026 for High-Speed Rail R&D Domain: Get the latest BEML Limited recruitment notification 2026 for various Executive vacancies including Senior Manager, Manager, Assistant Manager, and Engineer posts for Various Systems of High-Speed Rail - R&D Domain. The online application portal is open and the last date to apply online is 18 May 2026 (up to 18:00 Hrs). Apply through the official BEML career page at www.bemlindia.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming BEML High-Speed Rail Executive Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced cand

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated via email and BEML website

application_fee.details: Eligible and interested GEN/EWS/OBC candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee online by clicking "Pay Application Fee Online" at the end of the application form. SC/ST and PwD candidates are exempt from payment of application fee.

age_limit.details: Age, Qualification and Experience are calculated as on 14.05.2026. The upper age limit is relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC-NCL candidates as per Govt. of India guidelines. For PwD candidates, the upper age limit is relaxable by an additional 10 years over and above the admissible age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC(NCL), subject to minimum 40% disability. The upper age limit can also be relaxed for candidates under all categories subject to equivalent years of excess post qualification experience, however the maximum age with relaxation shall not exceed 57 years. | Besides Basic Pay, selected candidates will be eligible for Variable Dearness Allowance, Perquisites & Allowances (under the Cafeteria System), Company Accommodation/House Rent Allowance, Provident Fund, Gratuity, PRP etc. as per the prevailing Company Rules.

qualification.details: Only Indian Nationals may apply. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including age, qualification, and experience as on 14.05.2026. Under qualifying marks, First Class is reckoned at 60% (aggregate of all semesters/years). Qualifying marks are relaxable by 5% for SC/ST and PwD candidates. Candidates with CGPA/Credit system must mandatorily provide conversion to percentage. Candidates with Degree in Engineering from allied branches of Mechanical/Electrical can also apply for relevant positions provided they possess the requisite Post Qualification Experience. BEML will not consider freelance experience as part of Post Qualification Experience. | Educational Qualification (Mandatory for all positions)

selection_process: Stage 1 – Application Shortlisting Applications scrutinized based on eligibility criteria - qualification, experience, age, category (as applicable).
Stage 2 – Assessment Shortlisted candidates called for assessment. Mode and details to be communicated via email and BEML website.

Stage 3 – Pre-employment Medical Examination & Document Verification Shortlisted candidates post-assessment must undergo medical examination and submit original documents for verification. Any falsification of documents/wrong declaration will lead to rejection of candidature.
The selection process for BEML High-Speed Rail Executive Recruitment 2026 consists of shortlisting of eligible candidates based on application details

and Original Document Verification. Merely meeting the conditions of the advertisement will not automatically entitle a candidate to be called for assessment. Management reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates to be called for assessment and to increase the qualifying percentage based on the number of applications received. Management also reserves the right to cancel the advertisement in full or in part and/or the selection process at its discretion. All intimation regarding assessments
provisional/final offer etc. will be sent only through email.
how_to_apply: Candidates are required to apply online only through the BEML career page at www.bemlindia.in. The online registration site will be available till 18:00 Hrs on 18 May 2026 (Thursday). Before applying, candidates must ensure they have a valid email ID and mobile number - these will be used for all future correspondence and cannot be changed during the recruitment process. The Registration number generated must be noted for all future correspondences. Candidates shall apply for only a single position which is most suitable.

While filling in the online application, the experience section must be filled by providing the latest experience first, followed by previous experience. A pen picture of the experience relevant to the position applied to (at least 200–300 words per experience) must be written. Incomplete applications or applications without the mandatory document uploads will be summarily rejected. Corrigendum/Addendum, if any, will be hosted on the BEML website only.
Documents to be Uploaded Along with Online Application (Legible Copies Mandatory):
Qualifying Degree Marks cards - all semester marks cards (CGPA/Credits candidates must indicate conversion formula to percentage as per University norms)
Identity card issued by Government of India (Aadhaar, Passport, Driving License, PAN Card, etc.)
OBC/EWS/SC/ST/PwD certificate (as applicable, in the format as applicable for appointment to posts under Government of India)
All Experience Certificates/Documents clearly indicating start & end dates of each employment (non-adherence will lead to rejection)

Candidates employed in Central/State Government, Autonomous bodies, Quasi-Government and PSU must either: (a) send the print out of online application through proper channel to reach Sr. Manager, Recruitment Cell, BEML Soudha, BEML Limited, 23/1, 4th Main, S.R. Nagar, Bengaluru 560027 within 10 days from closing date; or (b) produce NOC specific to the position applied for at the time of assessment. For queries, email: [email protected]
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals may apply. All eligibility criteria (age, qualification, experience) must be fulfilled as on 14.05.2026. First Class is reckoned at 60% aggregate of all semesters/years. Qualifying marks are relaxable by 5% for SC/ST and PwD candidates. Candidates shall apply only for a single position which is most suitable - applications for multiple positions will not be entertained. Application fee of Rs. 500/- is non-refundable and applicable only to GEN/EWS/OBC candidates. SC/ST/PwD candidates are exempt. BEML will not consider freelance experience as part of Post Qualification Experience. Private sector candidates must be employed in a regular capacity and must submit experience certificate on the letterhead of the company along with reporting structure details. Government/PSU employees must submit application through proper channel or produce NOC at the time of assessment, failing which candidature will not be entertained. All documents uploaded must be legible - inability to read uploaded copies could cause rejection of candidature. All experience certificates must clearly indicate start & end dates of each employment - failure to adhere will lead to rejection. Any request for change in category, address, email, mobile number etc., as declared in the online application will not be entertained. Any sort of canvassing or influencing of officials related to recruitment/selection process will result in immediate disqualification. All intimation regarding assessments, provisional/final offers etc., will be sent only through email. The email ID and mobile number provided must remain valid for at least one year. Appointment of selected candidates is subject to meeting the medical standard of the Company and receipt of satisfactory medical report from the Company Medical Officer. Corrigendum/Addendum, if any, will be hosted on the BEML website only at www.bemlindia.in.

faq.question: Q1. What is BEML High-Speed Rail Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BEML Limited has released Advertisement No. KP/S/06/2026 dated 29 April 2026 for recruitment of Executives (Senior Manager, Manager, Assistant Manager and Engineer/Officer) in High‑Speed Rail – R&D domains such as interface, system engineering, carbody, FEA, crash, CFD, mechanical design, HVAC, doors, and brake systems.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in BEML High-Speed Rail Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 27 executive vacancies have been announced across multiple R&D domains for High‑Speed Rail, distributed among Grade‑V Senior Manager, Grade‑IV Manager, Grade‑III Assistant Manager and Grade‑II Engineer/Officer posts.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for BEML High-Speed Rail Executive 2026?
faq.answer: The advertisement is dated 29 April 2026, and the last date to submit the online application is 18 May 2026 up to 18:00 hours. All eligibility criteria regarding age, qualification and experience are calculated as on 14 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What posts are available under BEML High-Speed Rail R&D Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Posts include Senior Manager (Interface‑Rollingstock), Manager (System Engineering, Rollingstock‑Signalling Interface, Carbody Structure, Mech. Furnishing, Mechanical Systems Design), Assistant Manager (Rollingstock‑Mech/Bogie, CFD – Aerodynamics & HVAC, Mechanical Design & Integration, Air Supply & Brake System) and Engineer roles in Interface, System Engineering, Carbody, FEA, Crash Simulation, Mech. Design, Furnishing, Doors, HVAC, and Outfitting.

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility criteria for BEML High-Speed Rail Executive posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Indian Nationals with a full‑time First‑Class Degree in Engineering (generally 60% aggregate, relaxable by 5% for SC/ST/PwD) in Mechanical/Electrical/Automobile/Rail Vehicle or relevant allied branches, plus post‑qualification industry experience in the specified R&D domain (2 years for Grade‑II, 4 years for Grade‑III, 8 years for Grade‑IV, 11 years for Grade‑V, post‑qualification only).

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for BEML High-Speed Rail Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As on 14 May 2026, the upper age limit is generally 29 years for Engineer (Grade‑II), 30 years for Assistant Manager (Grade‑III), 34 years for Manager (Grade‑IV) and 39 years for Senior Manager (Grade‑V), with relaxations of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC‑NCL and an additional 10 years for PwD, subject to a maximum relaxed age not exceeding 57 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary or pay scale for BEML High-Speed Rail Executive posts?
faq.answer: Pay scales (IDA pattern) are approximately Rs. 40,000–1,40,000 for Grade‑II Engineer/Officer, Rs. 50,000–1,60,000 for Grade‑III Assistant Manager, Rs. 60,000–1,80,000 for Grade‑IV Manager and Rs. 70,000–2,00,000 for Grade‑V Senior Manager, plus Variable Dearness Allowance, perquisites under cafeteria system, accommodation/HRA, PF, gratuity, PRP and other benefits as per company rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for BEML High-Speed Rail Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: GEN/EWS/OBC candidates must pay a non‑refundable application fee of Rs. 500/- through the online payment facility linked to the application form, while SC/ST and PwD candidates are fully exempted from paying any application fee.
